threads.label: Iran / Hormuz
threads.status_line: US day-2 strikes Jun 10 on Iranian ports/Hormuz-area islands; Iran retaliates with missile/drone strikes on US bases in Jordan (Azraq), Kuwait (Ali Al Salem), Bahrain (Fifth Fleet) — IRGC claims 21 targets, 4 destroyed including F-35 hangar; all largely intercepted, no US casualties; Iran joint military command formally declares Strait closed with shoot-on-sight threat; Brent $96+; June 22 talks nominally on but conditions severely degraded
expand_if: vessel fired upon attempting Hormuz passage
new major US or Israeli strike escalating beyond ports/islands
India escalates response to missing/killed Settebello crew
Jordan formally protests to Iran or convenes emergency consultation

threads.label: World Cup 2026
threads.status_line: Tournament opened Jun 11 at Estadio Azteca — Mexico vs South Africa (Group A, 8pm BST); Shakira/Burna Boy opening ceremony; England vs Croatia Jun 17 in Dallas; 48-team format runs to Jul 19 MetLife final; Fleetwood Mac/Mr Brightside/Sex on Fire chart surge marks World Cup cultural moment
expand_if: major off-field controversy (player, host city, Trump involvement)
cultural flashpoint around tournament (protest, geopolitical moment)

threads.label: Ebola Bundibugyo — DRC / Uganda
threads.status_line: 598 confirmed DRC / 115 deaths as of Jun 10 (up from 452/88 on Jun 6); ~37 new cases/day; US State Dept adds $20M for border-state preparedness; PHEIC in force; no spread beyond DRC/Uganda
expand_if: confirmed case in Burundi, Rwanda, or South Sudan
second American or European healthcare worker infected

threads.label: Taiwan Strait Tension
threads.status_line: Taiwan's first HIMARS firing into Taiwan Strait Jun 10 confirmed (live-fire drill directed toward China); Trump paused follow-on HIMARS arms deal after Xi summit; China response not yet issued; minimal Western media coverage
expand_if: China issues formal military response or condemnation
Trump resumes or formally cancels Taiwan arms deal
PLA conducts counter-drill or naval exercise near Taiwan
US diplomatic statement on Taiwan independence or One China policy
Taiwan announces further HIMARS deployment or expanded capability

threads.label: Israel / Lebanon
threads.status_line: No new escalation since Jun 7-8 exchange; Hezbollah still rejecting pilot zones; Lebanon ceasefire remains Iran's precondition for US deal; next talks Jun 22 week
expand_if: Hezbollah formally accepts or rejects pilot zones framework
Hezbollah rocket barrage on Israeli cities
comprehensive ceasefire agreement with withdrawal timelines
US forces Israel to pause Lebanon operations
Trump public demand for Netanyahu to halt Lebanon ops

threads.label: UK Labour Leadership
threads.status_line: Makerfield by-election Jun 18; Polymarket: Burnham 56% likely next PM vs Starmer 26%; Starmer campaigning for Burnham despite leadership threat; 95+ MPs calling for resignation; Streeting resigned cabinet
expand_if: Burnham statement on fiscal rules or Bank of England independence
Major gilt/sterling reaction to political news
Burnham or Streeting endorsement from significant cabinet minister

threads.label: UK Economic Stress
threads.status_line: FTSE ~10,227 (−0.3%); Brent $96+ (rising from $94.60); 30Y gilt 5.60%; 10Y 4.94%; Nasdaq −2% risk-off; BoE first hike priced September; energy price pass-through risk increasing with Brent trajectory
expand_if: gilt yield spike above 5.8% with upward trajectory

threads.label: Ukraine Peace Deadline
threads.status_line: Zelensky open letter to Putin proposing direct meeting (Jun 5); Putin unlikely to accept; Trump asked Xi to lean on Putin at Beijing summit; talks structurally stalled; US bandwidth consumed by Iran conflict
expand_if: major US pressure on Ukraine (aid suspension)
Russia agrees to any settlement framework

threads.label: UK Kirpan Debate
threads.status_line: Parliament debated Jun 9; Home Secretary defended exemption; law unchanged; Reform's repeal pledge gaining online traction
expand_if: Government statement on kirpan exemption review
Backbench parliamentary bill to repeal exemption tabled
Sikh community organisations make formal complaint to police or EHRC
Polling published on public attitudes to kirpan exemption
Farage or Reform make this a formal policy position

threads.label: Syria Parliament
threads.status_line: First session did not convene Jun 8 as planned; al-Sharaa has not named his 70-seat presidential quota; no new date announced; transition timeline slipping
expand_if: parliament convenes and passes significant legislation

threads.label: Russia / NATO / Romania
threads.status_line: Constanta port drone Jun 5 confirmed Ukrainian origin via electronic jamming; NATO foreign ministers discussing drone-over-allied-territory protocols; no further incident since Jun 5
expand_if: fatality from a drone strike in NATO territory
NATO adopts shoot-down authority for drones over Allied territory
Russian conventional strike on NATO infrastructure

threads.label: Mearsheimer
threads.status_line: Netanyahu-blocking thesis reinforced by Jun 10-11 exchange (Israel's Lebanon operation active, blocking US deal progress); Crooke's parallel 'America's Suez Crisis' frame corroborated by Iran's escalatory deterrence; no new Mearsheimer post or appearance
expand_if: new post or appearance shifting the argument
Trump-Netanyahu public confrontation matches Mearsheimer's framing
mainstream US policy community engages with the Netanyahu-veto argument

retired_threads.label: Cannes 2026
retired_threads.retired_because: Festival closed May 23 — time-bounded event, no ongoing story
retired_threads.revive_if: Mungiu or another winner makes a politically significant statement in the press circuit; or Fjord triggers a specific diplomatic controversy

retired_threads.label: Venice Biennale 2026
retired_threads.retired_because: 7 consecutive days stable with last_changed 2026-05-22; no new incident or statement surfaced in research
retired_threads.revive_if: Pavilion closure, protest, prize announcement with political dimension, or Israeli/Palestinian pavilion controversy

retired_threads.label: Olivia Dean / UK Chart
retired_threads.retired_because: 7 consecutive days stable with last_changed 2026-05-22; chart positions unchanged — divergence already documented
retired_threads.revive_if: Loses #1, drops out of top 10, new single or album announcement, or chart run officially noted as record-breaking

retired_threads.label: Tucker Carlson
retired_threads.retired_because: 7 consecutive days stable; last changed 2026-05-23; no new episodes or significant statements detected since May 20 Thomas Massie/Israel lobby episode
retired_threads.revive_if: New major episode on Iran deal, Russia, or Ukraine; public clash with Trump administration escalates; platform change; returns to pro-Trump framing

retired_threads.label: SNP Crisis / Murrell
retired_threads.retired_because: 7 consecutive stable days since last_changed 2026-05-26; guilty plea entered the public record; no new developments. Sentencing June 23 is a known future event.
retired_threads.revive_if: June 23 sentencing produces significant prison term or new allegations emerge in court; Nicola Sturgeon makes public statement; SNP leadership formally challenged; new financial allegations against other SNP figures

retired_threads.label: Turkey — CHP / Opposition
retired_threads.retired_because: 8 consecutive stable days since last_changed 2026-06-01; Imamoglu corruption trial and espionage trial both ongoing but no verdict, release, or major new development
retired_threads.revive_if: Imamoglu released or verdict delivered; CHP headquarters sealed permanently; street protests escalate to general strike; EU or US formal condemnation; constitutional court ruling on Imamoglu detention

retired_threads.label: Sudan Famine
retired_threads.retired_because: 8 consecutive stable days since last_changed 2026-06-01; lean season started June as projected; no new IPC famine declaration, funding announcement, or ceasefire
retired_threads.revive_if: IPC declares additional famine zones beyond the 14 at risk; major donor announces significant new funding; Western government makes Sudan a diplomatic priority; ceasefire between SAF and RSF; humanitarian corridor agreement

retired_threads.label: Operation Southern Spear
retired_threads.retired_because: 7 consecutive stable days since last_changed 2026-06-04; 207 killed in 63 strikes as of Jun 3; no new independent investigation, casualty surge above threshold, ICC referral, or US congressional hearing surfaced today
retired_threads.revive_if: Death toll surpasses 300 with renewed media coverage; ICC or ICJ referral; Guardian or equivalent major new investigation identifying victims; Colombian government statement on Southern Spear; US congressional oversight hearing scheduled

retired_threads.label: Colombia Election 2026
retired_threads.retired_because: 10 consecutive stable days since last_changed 2026-06-01; no major polling shift, violence, or candidate statement surfaced today; runoff not until Jun 21
retired_threads.revive_if: Jun 21 runoff result (de la Espriella ~44% vs Cepeda ~41%); significant violence or electoral irregularity before Jun 21; major polling shift

source_discoveries.name: Richard Haass — 'Home & Away' Substack
source_discoveries.why_interesting: Former CFR president arguing Trump is recreating the JCPOA he destroyed, and that regime change pressure produced a more hardline Iranian government — structural counter-frame to deal optimism

source_discoveries.name: L'Orient Today
source_discoveries.why_interesting: English-language edition of L'Orient Le Jour; takes a meaningfully different political line from Al-Nahar on Lebanese politics; useful for south Lebanon coverage

source_discoveries.name: Asharq Al-Awsat (English)
source_discoveries.why_interesting: Gulf-backed pan-Arab daily; broke the Syria parliament June 8 story before other outlets; consistently ahead on Gulf/Arab political transitions and has senior source access in Beirut and Damascus

source_discoveries.name: Velina Tchakarova — Substack
source_discoveries.why_interesting: Vienna-based geopolitical analyst; Austrian/Central European perspective on Ukraine distinct from Washington/London axis; published 'The Ukraine War: The June Opening and Its Limits' Jun 4 — structural frame less invested in Ukrainian optimism or Western hand-wringing

source_discoveries.name: Alastair Crooke — Conflicts Forum Substack
source_discoveries.why_interesting: Former senior British diplomat and MI6 officer; argues Hezbollah advises Iran rather than takes orders, inverting the proxy narrative; Jun 2026 pieces frame Iran's posture as calculated 'escalatory deterrence' not desperate deal-seeking — 'America's Suez Crisis' thesis argues US is in Britain's 1956 position; prediction confirmed within 24h on Jun 11

source_discoveries.name: Trita Parsi — Quincy Institute / Democracy Now
source_discoveries.why_interesting: NIAC founder, Quincy Institute fellow; consistent frame since April that Trump is 'not in a dominant position' and that the fire-for-fire exchange is bounded by both sides' inability to afford full escalation; structurally different from both hawkish and catastrophist Western readings
